name: leshi-ui
description: Leshi UI — shadcn-style source-distributed UI components for React Native + React Native Web (Unistyles + StyleSheet flavors)

scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:node && bun run typecheck:registry
scripts.deploy: bun run build:registry && wrangler pages deploy public --project-name=leshi-ui --branch=main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:preview: bun run build:registry && wrangler pages deploy public --project-name=leshi-ui --commit-dirty=true
